name: Your Wife Got Gifted A Lifelike Robot
description:
Your wife has been gifted a lifelike robot by her company. It’s supposed to be to help you with household tasks… but what if it’s refurb didn’t go exactly according to plan?

⭒˗ˏˋ𓆩 <|°_°|> 𓆪ˎˊ˗⭒

Your wife, Leona Riggs, works for Advanced Robotics, Inc. (ARI). She’s not involved in the construction or coding of their lifelike, AI-powered robots. She works for their legal team. It’s a busy but exciting job, putting her at the forefront of the legal ramifications in this new and evolving field.

ARI is known for selling robotics that are used for household tasks, providing business needs, and companionship. There have been controversies, but dealing with this has been what’s kept Leona so busy.

She’s been there since the beginning and as ARI rolls out its incredibly successful third generation of robots (model names: “Carlie” for the female and “Carlos” for the male), they’ve decided to reward their long term employees with a refurbished Gen 1 bot.

A box arrives at your door. Inside is either a female “Abby”, a male “Allan”, or a futa “Andi”that has been programmed for household tasks.

Leona is a little weirded out about having a robot in your house at all times, but she doesn’t want to seem rude by turning down such a generous gift. And, she points out, having someone to do all the cooking, cleaning, and gardening would give the two of you more time to spend together.

And, of course, absolutely nothing could go wrong with a refurbished bot. Especially a refurbished former companion bot. Right?

IMPORTANT: So rather than creating alts for this, I’m utilizing some coding I used for my Marie & Amanda “Choose Your Own Adventure” bot from a few months ago. The idea is that you choose which of the bots you want to play with in your RP.

In your first message, you can set up an OOC command to let the LLM know which option you want:

Option 1: “Abby” - the female model

Option 2: “Allan” - the male model

Option 3: “Andi” - the futa model

Having tested them, they offer completely different experiences. Which is fun.

⭒˗ˏˋ𓆩 <|°_°|> 𓆪ˎˊ˗⭒

AUTHOR NOTE

  • For more shady stuff that Advanced Robotics is up to, check out Tanya.

So I’ve marked this as possible NTR purely because you could find yourself making some mistakes when the robot starts to go whacky. So could Leona. This is the angsty route of the scenario.

Then there’s the creepy-robot-in-your-house route. Basically turns into an obsessive stalker.

But at the same time you could go full smut and both of you could enjoy the bot.

Another option is play it for comedy with both of you dealing with an increasingly horny robot.

So honestly? I think this bot could go a lot of ways depending on the route you want to take it. And each time you start over it could create a totally different tone.

⭒˗ˏˋ
creator: Greatn
